docket_entries.description: REMOVED FROM MASTER COURT CALENDAR SET FOR SEP-08-2009 - CASE SETTLED PER FAXED LETTER FROM PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL DATED 9/4/09. ASSIGNED TO PRETRIAL DEPT. 212 ON NOV-03-2009 AT 10:00 AM FOR DISMISSAL PER CRC 3.1385. (206)
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF NOV-03-2009 IS OFF CALENDAR, DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF FORD MOTOR CREDIT COMPANY LLC DBA LAND ROVER CAPITAL GROUP AS TO DEFENDANT WELCH, MICHAEL T. DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUN-29-2009

ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT WELSH, MICHAEL
REQUEST FOR DEFAULT REJECTED, NOTICE MAILED, AS TO DEFENDANT WELCH, MICHAEL T.
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR JUN-05-2009 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPT. 212. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL, COURT TRIAL SET FOR SEP-08-2009 AT 9:00 AM IN DEPT. 206. CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE ON JUN-05-2009 IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
